nl.en: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.ko: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.ja: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.zh: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.hi: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?

queries.kql:
delayed_flights
| where last_7_days(actual_arr)
| join compensation on flight_id
| where amount > 1000
| summarize count=count(), total=sum(amount), avg=avg(amount), top_route=top(1, route)

nl.en: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.ko: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.ja: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.zh: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.hi: Top 5 routes by delay last month

queries.kql: flights | where last_30_days(actual_arr) | where delay_minutes > 15 | summarize count=count() by route | order by count desc | take 5

nl.en: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.ko: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.ja: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.zh: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.hi: Average compensation per airline this quarter

queries.kql: compensation | join airlines on airline_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize avg=avg(amount) by airline_name | order by avg desc
aircraft | join maintenance on aircraft_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize events=count() by aircraft_id, model | order by events desc | take 3

vpAnswer.source: Fabric IQ ontology · live query · 1.9s · ⭐ first 5/7/2026 trace

queries.kql: airlines | project airline_id, name | order by name asc
